content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

October 2, 2012


Jerry Sincich
jsinciich1@ca.rr.com


Re:    Your Request for Advice
       Our File No. W-12-148

Dear Mr. Sincich:

     This letter responds to your request for advice regarding the reporting provisions of the
Political Reform Act (the "Act").¹ Per your telephone request on October 2, 2012, we are
withdrawing your request for advice.

     If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

                                                       Sincerely,

                                                       Zackery P. Morazzini
                                                       General Counsel

                                              By:     Heather M. Rowan
                                                      Counsel, Legal Division

HMR:jgl




_______________
     ¹ The Political Reform Act is contained in Government Code Sections 81000 through 91014. All statutory
references are to the Government Code, unless otherwise indicated. The regulations of the Fair Political Practices
Commission are contained in Sections 18110 through 18997 of Title 2 of the California Code of Regulations. All
regulatory references are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations, unless otherwise indicated.

sections.question_synthetic: The requestor sought advice regarding reporting provisions of the Political Reform Act, but the specific question is not detailed in this withdrawal letter.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC granted the requestor's telephone request to withdraw their advice request on October 2, 2012.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Withdrawal letter with no substantive QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections. Document confirms withdrawal was made by telephone request. File number W-12-148 indicates withdrawal status.
